Strikeforce mixed martial arts event in 2012
Strikeforce: Barnett vs. Cormier
The poster for Strikeforce: Barnett vs. Cormier
PromotionStrikeforce
DateMay 19, 2012
VenueHP Pavilion
CitySan Jose, California, United States
Event chronology
Strikeforce: Tate vs. Rousey Strikeforce: Barnett vs. Cormier Strikeforce: Rockhold vs. Kennedy

Strikeforce: Barnett vs. Cormier was a mixed martial arts event held by Strikeforce. It took place on May 19, 2012, at the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

Nate Marquardt was expected to fight Tyron Woodley at this event for the vacant Strikeforce Welterweight Championship.[3] It instead took place at Strikeforce: Rockhold vs. Kennedy, where Marquardt won the title by fourth-round knockout.

Results

[edit]
Main card (Showtime)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight Daniel Cormier def. Josh Barnett Decision (unanimous) (49–46, 50–45, 50–45) 5 5:00 [a]
Lightweight Gilbert Melendez (c) def. Josh Thomson Decision (split) (47–48, 48–47, 48–47) 5 5:00 [b]
Light Heavyweight Rafael Cavalcante vs. Mike Kyle No Contest (overturned) 1 0:33 [c]
Welterweight Chris Spång def. Nah-Shon Burrell TKO (knees) 1 3:25
Preliminary card (Showtime Extreme)
Lightweight Isaac Vallie-Flagg def. Gesias Cavalcante Decision (split) (29–28, 29–28, 28–29) 3 5:00
Lightweight Bobby Green def. James Terry Decision (split) (28–29, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Welterweight Quinn Mulhern def. Yuri Villefort Decision (split) (30–27, 28–29, 29–28) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Gian Villante def. Derrick Mehmen Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Guto Inocente def. Virgil Zwicker Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ The Strikeforce Heavyweight Grand Prix final.
  2. ^ For the Strikeforce Lightweight Championship.
  3. ^ Originally a submission (guillotine choke) win for Cavalcante; result overturned to a no contest after Cavalcante tested positive for stanozolol.
